seoTitle: Polo Flat vs Pomona — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Polo Flat and Pomona. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Polo Flat vs Pomona: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Polo Flat and Pomona.
heading: Polo Flat vs Pomona — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Polo Flat, New South Wales and Pomona, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pomona has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Polo Flat (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Polo Flat or Pomona safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Polo Flat has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Pomona scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Polo Flat scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Pomona scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Polo Flat or Pomona?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pomona has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
